exhibits.walked_source: Item 17 tables (pp 80-82), Item 6 fee notes, Item 8, Item 11, Item 12, Item 15 — key operative terms extracted
exhibits.why_deferred: 59-page agreement — key operative terms thoroughly extracted from Item 17 cross-reference tables and detailed Item body discussions. Full clause-by-clause walk would require extensive additional page reads with diminishing marginal return given comprehensive Item-level coverage.
exhibits.already_recovered: Term (20yr+10+10), royalty (5%), advertising (4.6-5.0%+), termination (curable 30d / noncurable), transfer ($7,500 + conditions), noncompete (2yr/10mi/chicken QSR), ROFR, death/disability (12-18mo), venue (Florida), insurance requirements, operational standards, technology mandates, managing director requirements, guarantee scope, AI restrictions
exhibits.remaining_missing: Force majeure clause detail, exact indemnification language, specific remodeling timeline/triggers, exact inspection frequency provisions, specific PCI compliance penalty language

exhibits.why_deferred: 34-page lease — rent formulas, termination, and transfer terms extracted from Item 6 Note 6 and Item 17 Lease table. Full clause walk would add environmental, maintenance, and surrender detail but key economic terms are captured.
exhibits.already_recovered: Term (20yr), rent formula (10% of capitalized costs, 125% of PLK rent, 8.5%/10% percentage rent, 12% escalation), curable defaults (10d payment, 30d other), non-curable (bankruptcy, false statements), assignment, environmental obligations on termination
exhibits.remaining_missing: Detailed environmental compliance provisions, casualty/condemnation provisions, specific maintenance standards, subordination provisions, signage rights

exhibits.why_deferred: Key EBITDA test mechanism and rate escalation extracted from Item 6 Note 4. Full walk would add exact EBITDA threshold amounts and remodel timeline extension detail.
exhibits.already_recovered: Rate escalation (5.0% → 5.25% → 5.50%), revert mechanism, EBITDA-based testing, remodel timeline extension (10yr vs 6yr), vote override mechanism
exhibits.remaining_missing: Exact EBITDA increase thresholds, measurement period definitions, remodel scope requirements

exhibits.why_deferred: Key terms extracted from Item 17 tables. Development Agreements are individually negotiated and terms vary. Standard form provisions covered.
